title: [FIRRTL] Convert tests related to reset into integration tests
body:
* As a follow-up to the discussion in #1497, move the reset-related tests into a new `test/Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests` directory, starting a new collection of integration tests that verify end-to-end behaviour against what is expected of the Scala implementation.

* Inlining and IMConstProp generate additional opportunities for canonicalization, especially around registers with invalid/constant reset signals and values. To leverage these, firtool should run the canonicalizer again just before going into the output-specific pipelines.

### Todo
- [x] Land #1527
